title: Matera Featured in Off the Rails Podcast
excerpt: Join FPC Executive Director Reed Luhtanen as he goes off the rails with Sarah Hoisington, Head of Marketing and Strategy for Matera US. Reed and Sarah talk about the ways QR codes
body:
Join FPC Executive Director Reed Luhtanen as he goes off the rails with Sarah Hoisington, Head of Marketing and Strategy for Matera US. Reed and Sarah talk about the ways QR codes can be used to initiate faster payments, the fraud prevention protocols that can be put in place to reduce fraud, and sourdough bread.

Listen to the full podcast [here](https://podcasts.apple.com/gb/podcast/12-sept-2024-sarah-hoisington-from-matera-on-qr-codes/id1553535872?i=1000669234265).
